data.body:
=== RESUMABLE STATE CHECKPOINT (context high) — epic f1fa auto-lander ===
WORKTREE: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-autolander. AWS: profile 'frontier' (use: eval $(aws configure export-credentials --profile frontier --format env); us-east-1). Gerrit host EC2 i-00880b2c7f13527c5; deploy via SSM (sudo systemctl start rebar-autodeploy.service, OR compose-up.sh). Bot creds: RebarBotNava (contributor); admin JoeOakhartNava (both in keychain, pin username).

STATUS: The auto-lander is DEPLOYED + LIVE + DOGFOOD-PROVEN (change #618 landed end-to-end by 'Rebar Bot Nava', incl. a live rebase-on-behalf to PS3). All epic code+docs LANDED on main.
TICKETS: closed = S1(843b), S2a(89f9), S2b(a9e3), S2c(1ccf), S4(73f5), S6(b825), S5a(08e1 force), S5c(9a6f force). STILL OPEN: epic f1fa; S2(0ee8); S3(0525); S5(3c55); S5b(ea61); S5d(38be).
PATTERN for closing live-check tickets: tag the live-check AC line '[operator-attested]' + record a dogfood/deploy attestation comment (#618 evidence), then REBAR_GATE_REF=HEAD rebar transition <id> in_progress closed. For tickets whose file_impact has no 1:1 commit trailer (landed under 3c55/#593), use --force-close with the landed-under-story reason.

IN-FLIGHT WORK (S5d 38be + ea61 hardening, user chose 'implement fully'):
- DONE (uncommitted in worktree on branch fix-drive-glue base... actually current branch state has S5d edits): compose stop_grace_period:120s; fetch-secrets get_param (fail-fast) for autolander-gerrit-token; write_recovery+load_recovery now carry 'acknowledged' (load returns (wip,acknowledged) TUPLE); reconcile_recovery expanded to per-phase + unacknowledged-handback re-drive; tests added (crash-at-each-phase matrix, unacknowledged-handback, heartbeat-freshness integrated) + fixed the round-trip test tuple-unpack.
- TODO: run_loop bounded-120s-drain + heartbeat-during-drain wiring (SIGTERM should finish in-flight wip bounded, heartbeat each tick, before exit — currently stops immediately); rewrite infra/gerrit/smoke-check-autolander.sh to AC5 READ-ONLY provisioning checks (grep project.config for rebase grant + GET /a/projects/rebar/access diff vs baseline, NOT the write-based rebase test); then lint/test, commit (rebar-ticket 38be for loop.py+compose, ea61 for fetch-secrets+smoke), land via CI (FFO treadmill ~1hr/change; rebase onto origin/main on 409), redeploy, then close 38be + ea61 (operator-attested tags for live-checks), then S2(0ee8), S5(3c55) stories, then epic f1fa. Also #624 (S3 0525 drive-glue fix) must LAND then close S3.
- README doc-sweep TODO (user request, after dogfood): README.md ~line 298 'submit once both votes pass' -> reference the auto-lander (set Autosubmit / run land). CLAUDE.md/CONTRIBUTING.md/your-first-change.md already done by S6.

BUGS FILED (discovered work): 5e40 (plan-review non-convergence, operator-approved remediation); 0d3e (non-sticky Autosubmit dropped by bot's own rebase stalls landing under concurrent traffic — real gap, JUST filed).
DRIVE BUGS FOUND+FIXED via dogfood (all mock-invisible, landed): upfront-rebase-of-on-tip (#597); merged-ancestor chain misclass (#607); is_landable missing SUBMITTABLE opt (#619, fake hardened); rebase-409-not-handed-back + transient-Verified-0-false-fail (#624 landing).
MINOR FOLLOW-UP: close_ticket_via_rebar annotates using the Gerrit change-id not the rebar-ticket trailer -> best-effort annotate fails + spurious AUTOLANDER_ERROR (land still succeeds).
